title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TransIndia Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TransIndia Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
